Before asking a question, please make sure you’ve checked:

- README
- Existing Issues

- Write your question and add any relevant information you can provide.
- If necessary, add the version of Nautilus you are using in your project
- Provide the Windows version along with the PowerShell version of the target machine if needed
- Provide any additional context that might be necessary
